query:
INSERT INTO assignments (
            id,
            slug,
            name,
            max_score,
            execution_config,
            runner_config,
            capabilities,
            created_at,
            updated_at
        )
        VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7, $8, $8)
        RETURNING
            id,
            slug,
            name,
            max_score,
            execution_config AS "execution_config: SqlxJson<Value>",
            runner_config AS "runner_config: SqlxJson<Value>",
            capabilities AS "capabilities: SqlxJson<Value>",
            created_at,
            updated_at
